title: gymneia interrupta
intro: Gymneia interrupta, also known as the interrupted gymneia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Celastraceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Gymneia interrupta include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and ointments for various therapeutic applications.
